query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ad_investment_records (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  brandId INT NOT NULL,
  investmentDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  adType ENUM('live', 'clip', 'mixed') DEFAULT 'mixed' NOT NULL,
  totalBudget BIGINT NOT NULL,
  liveBudget BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  clipBudget BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  actualGmv BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  actualImpressions BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  actualClicks BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  actualConversions INT DEFAULT 0,
  actualRoas DECIMAL(10, 4) DEFAULT 0,
  cpm DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0,
  cpc DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0,
  conversionRate DECIMAL(10, 4) DEFAULT 0,
  predictedGmv BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  predictedRoas DECIMAL(10, 4) DEFAULT 0,
  predictionAccuracy DECIMAL(10, 4) DEFAULT 0,
  campaignName VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  livestreamId INT,
  createdBy INT NOT NULL,
  createdByName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS brand_ad_performance_stats (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  brandId INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  avgRoas DECIMAL(10, 4) DEFAULT 0,
  avgCpm DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0,
  avgCpc DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0,
  avgConversionRate DECIMAL(10, 4) DEFAULT 0,
  liveAdAvgRoas DECIMAL(10, 4) DEFAULT 0,
  clipAdAvgRoas DECIMAL(10, 4) DEFAULT 0,
  optimalLiveRatio DECIMAL(5, 2) DEFAULT 0.5,
  optimalClipRatio DECIMAL(5, 2) DEFAULT 0.5,
  avgPredictionAccuracy DECIMAL(10, 4) DEFAULT 0,
  totalRecords INT DEFAULT 0,
  lastCalculatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
